description: Leif Vollebekk is an acclaimed singer-songwriter originally from Ottawa who now resides in Montreal. Vollebekk has sold-out headlining tours across North America, Europe and Australia. His 2017 release, Twin Solitude, was a breakthrough album, landing a spot on the Polaris Music Prize shortlist, a JUNO nomination and gathering over 60 million streams. “[His] songs […] are pensive and restless, blossoming with stream-of-consciousness verses that bear the marks of long nights spent alone on the road.” (The New York Times)
subtitle: Canada/QC
title: Leif Vollebekk Concert
